Al Hirt and his All-Star Sextet
Al Hirt, Trumpet, and New Orleans Music Festival

works.t: Is It True What They Say About Dixie?

about_quotes.speaker: Ellis Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: The musicians that he had in the band when I came in... his main man, Pee Wee Spitelera, was playing clarinet.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ellis Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Branford Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: My dad got Wynton’s trumpet from Al Hirt, who was a very successful New Orleans trumpeter and his clarinetist name was, Pee Wee Spitelera. So Pee Wee gave a clarinet to my dad for me to play.
about_quotes.doc_title: Branford Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
